name: Lantern Relay

players.names: Local turn labels only. Any three distinct short marks are accepted.

agent_gather.status: coordination recipe, not an AgentTool session or identity proof
agent_gather.if_three_distinct_contexts_are_unavailab: Stop; do not impersonate a missing player.
agent_gather.state: Keep the game ledger in the initiator's local orchestration context only.
agent_gather.views: Give each player only its current prompt. This separation is a play convention, not a security boundary.
assignments: player 1 laws player 2's seed and weaves player 1 + player 2
player 2 laws player 3's seed and weaves player 2 + player 3
player 3 laws player 1's seed and weaves player 3 + player 1
agent_gather.invalid_entry: Return the exact phase rule to the same player and do not advance until it corrects the entry or chooses to stop.
agent_gather.finish: Reveal the attributed world after nine accepted contributions. Any player may stop earlier without penalty.

phases.rule: Each player contributes one unique two-to-six-word fictional object.
Each player writes an eight-to-twenty-eight-word law for an assigned object, mentions it exactly, and includes must, cannot, or always.
Each player connects two assigned objects in ten-to-thirty-five words, mentions both exactly, and includes because.

outcome.artifact: One plain-text world containing all seeds, laws, and weaves with player attribution.
outcome.stopping: Stop party is available throughout. A stopped game gathers the partial artifact without penalty.

epilogue.name: First morning
epilogue.derivation: A deterministic browser-local recombination of the existing three seeds, three laws, and one of the three weaves.

privacy.game_state: JavaScript memory in the current browser tab only.
privacy.clipboard: The complete attributed world is sent to the device clipboard only after a player activates Copy the world.

doctrine: Nobody wins it; everybody makes it. Walking past is honored.
